Notice Of Hearing On Application For Stay Of Proceedings As Of July 14 Based On Conditional Notice Of Settlement And Joint Stipulation
Off Calendar Jul-12-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Andrew Thomas Sinclair, Esq., Calvo, Fisher & Jacob LLP, 415-374-8370, ats@sinclairlawoffice.com for Plaintiff.
Frank S. Moore, Esq., Law Offices of Frank S. Moore, APC, 415-292-6091 for Defendant.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF MICHAEL CULLEN'S Notice Of Hearing On Application For Stay Of Proceedings As Of July 14 Based On Conditional Notice Of Settlement And Joint Stipulation is granted.

The prevailing party is to submit a proposed order in compliance with CRC 3.132.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-10-2023 Set For Trial On Feb-20-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Application For In Camera Review And Finding Of Reasonable And Meritorious Cause
Off Calendar Mar-09-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MICHAEL CULLEN Notice Of Application For In Camera Review And Finding Of Reasonable And Meritorious Cause

Appearance (via ZOOM videoconference):
Andrew Thomas Sinclair, Esq. of CALVO FISHER & JACOB LLP, Tel: 415.374.8370, for plaintiff/moving party;
No other appearance.

Mr. Sinclair does not contest the tentative ruling, which was adopted by the court, as follows:

PLAINTIFF MICHAEL CULLEN's "application for in camera review and finding of reasonable and meritorious cause" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)
